name: Navigate Robot Arm Around Obstacles
description: CoppeliaSim is running with the obstacleAvoidanceAndIk scene, which contains a robot manipulator with IK enabled and obstacle spheres in the workspace. Move the robot's IK target dummy to [0.3, 0.3, 0.4] and then to [-0.3, 0.2, 0.3], ensuring the end-effector reaches the targets while avoiding collisions. Save a screenshot of the final robot pose to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/obstacle_nav_done.png.
